series_metadata.series_description: The Ohio Board of Regents (“OBR”) performs financial aid audits of state-supported institutions of higher education as well as private institutions per ORC 3333.047. OBR receives paper or electronic copies of student applications, transcripts, payment history (together, “student data”) from institutions being audited. OBR creates audit work papers and may issue an audit report at the closure of the enrollment audit.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Student data will be deleted or shredded as soon as audit is completed and data is no longer needed. Audit work papers will be retained annual audit by Auditor of State is released and any related discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Student data will be deleted or shredded as soon as audit is completed and data is no longer needed. Audit work papers will be retained annual audit by Auditor of State is released and any related discrepancies are resolved
